mapper.select: SELECT a.month AS `month`, SUM(a.power_value) AS totalLight FROM tunnel_carbon_day_push a WHERE a.devicelist_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT tdi.devicelist_id FROM tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi INNER JOIN t_user_tunnel u ON tdi.tunnel_id = u.tunnel_name_id AND u.user_id = #{userId} WHERE tdi.type = 2 ) AND a.year = #{year} GROUP BY a.month ORDER BY a.month

SELECT a.month AS `month`, SUM(a.power_value) AS totalLight FROM tunnel_carbon_day_push a WHERE a.devicelist_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT devicelist_id FROM tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo WHERE type = 2 ) AND a.year = #{year} GROUP BY a.month ORDER BY a.month
SELECT DISTINCT tdi.tunnel_id FROM tunnel_carbon_day_push a INNER JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON a.devicelist_id = tdi.devicelist_id AND tdi.type = 2 WHERE DATE(a.upload_time) = #{date}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tec.design_operating_power_total) * 24, 0) FROM tunnel_edge_computing_terminal tec WHERE tec.design_operating_power_total > 0 AND ( tec.tunnel_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT tdi.tunnel_id FROM tunnel_carbon_day_push a INNER JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON a.devicelist_id = tdi.devicelist_id AND tdi.type = 2 WHERE DATE(a.upload_time) = #{date} ) OR tec.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT tdi.tunnel_id FROM tunnel_carbon_day_push a INNER JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON a.devicelist_id = tdi.devicelist_id AND tdi.type = 2 WHERE DATE(a.upload_time) = #{date} ) )
